pages.text: Reduces all damage taken per level, per piece.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Amethyst Shard at an anvil.
pages.title: Resistant

pages.text: Reduces fire damage taken per level, per piece.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Magma Cream at an anvil.
pages.title: Fire Resistant

pages.text: Reduces explosion damage taken per level, per piece.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Tnt at an anvil.
pages.title: Blast Resistant

pages.text: Reduces projectile damage taken per level, per piece.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Turtle Scute at an anvil.
pages.title: Projectile Resistant

pages.text: Increases movement speed per level while worn.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Sugar at an anvil.
pages.title: Speedy

pages.text: Step up full blocks without jumping.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Piston at an anvil.
pages.title: High Stride

pages.text: Air lasts longer underwater.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Prismarine Crystals at an anvil.
pages.title: Amphibious

pages.text: Slowly repairs itself using your experience.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Moss Block at an anvil.
pages.title: Restoring

pages.text: Freezes water beneath your steps.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Blue Ice at an anvil.
pages.title: Frost Walker

pages.text: Hit harder while worn.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Blaze Rod at an anvil.
pages.title: Powerful

pages.text: Swing faster while worn.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Feather at an anvil.
pages.title: Dexterous

pages.text: Reach farther while worn.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() End Rod at an anvil.
pages.title: Telekinetic
